name: DroidDesk
desc: DroidDesk turns your Android phone into a real Linux desktop using Termux, Termux X11, TUR, and Proot. Run VS Code, Firefox, LibreOffice, Blender, and more wit…
descFull: DroidDesk turns your Android phone into a real Linux desktop using Termux, Termux X11, TUR, and Proot. Run VS Code, Firefox, LibreOffice, Blender, and more with X11 or VNC support for monitor setup.
